requirement_topic.en: EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Moroccan NM standard adopting CISPR 14 / EN 55014 series; ANRT for radio)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（摩洛哥采纳CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的NM标准；无线由ANRT管理）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（摩洛哥採納CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的NM標準；無線由ANRT管理）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility of household appliances (including refrigerators) in Morocco is addressed through Moroccan NM standards adopting the international CISPR 14 / EN 55014 family — the NM standard adopting CISPR 14-1 (emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) and the NM standard adopting CISPR 14-2 (immunity). EMC conformity is generally demonstrated within the same IMANOR certification / import-conformity assessment used for electrical safety rather than under a standalone horizontal EMC directive (Morocco has no EU-style 2014/30/EU EMC Directive). If a refrigerator includes radio functionality (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth smart-home features), the radio/telecom aspect is regulated separately by ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications), which controls radio equipment type-approval and spectrum use. Morocco's 220 V, 50 Hz grid matches China on frequency, so mains-related emission/immunity test conditions align closely with the appliance's domestic design.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容通过采纳国际CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的摩洛哥NM标准处理——采纳CISPR 14-1的NM标准（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射要求）和采纳CISPR 14-2的NM标准（抗扰度）。EMC符合性通常在用于电气安全的同一IMANOR认证/进口符合性评定中一并证明，而非依据独立的横向EMC指令（摩洛哥没有欧盟式的2014/30/EU EMC指令）。若电冰箱含无线功能（Wi-Fi/蓝牙智能家居功能），其无线/电信部分由ANRT（国家电信监管局）单独管理，负责无线设备型号核准及频谱使用。摩洛哥220 V、50 Hz电网在频率上与中国一致，因此与电网相关的发射/抗扰度测试条件与器具的国内设计高度吻合。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容通過採納國際CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的摩洛哥NM標準處理——採納CISPR 14-1的NM標準（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射要求）和採納CISPR 14-2的NM標準（抗擾度）。EMC符合性通常在用於電氣安全的同一IMANOR認證/進口符合性評定中一併證明，而非依據獨立的橫向EMC指令（摩洛哥沒有歐盟式的2014/30/EU EMC指令）。若電冰箱含無線功能（Wi-Fi/藍牙智慧家居功能），其無線/電信部分由ANRT（國家電信監管局）單獨管理，負責無線設備型號核准及頻譜使用。摩洛哥220 V、50 Hz電網在頻率上與中國一致，因此與電網相關的發射/抗擾度測試條件與器具的國內設計高度吻合。

standards_or_laws: NM standard adopting CISPR 14-1 / EN 55014-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (IMANOR national adoption)
NM standard adopting CISPR 14-2 / EN 55014-2 — Part 2: Immunity (IMANOR national adoption)
ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications) — radio equipment type-approval and spectrum, applicable only if the appliance has wireless connectivity

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonic current emissions; mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) where applicable. These are enforced under the CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China's GB 4343 series and Morocco's NM EMC standards descend from the same CISPR 14 base, the technical content is closely aligned — but a Chinese CCC EMC test report is not, by itself, accepted as Moroccan conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行，谐波电流发射方面在适用时依据GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA执行。由于中国GB 4343系列与摩洛哥NM电磁兼容标准同源于CISPR 14，技术内容高度接近——但中国CCC电磁兼容检测报告本身不被接受为摩洛哥符合性证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行，諧波電流發射方面在適用時依據GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA執行。由於中國GB 4343系列與摩洛哥NM電磁相容標準同源於CISPR 14，技術內容高度接近——但中國CCC電磁相容檢測報告本身不被接受為摩洛哥符合性證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Two practical gaps for Chinese exporters: (1) Conformity evidence — Morocco evaluates EMC within the IMANOR certification / import-conformity assessment, not under a separate EMC directive; the demonstration must reference the NM-adopted CISPR 14 texts, and a CCC EMC report (GB 4343.1) is not auto-recognised. Because both descend from CISPR 14, a CISPR 14-based CB/test report from an accredited laboratory is the most portable evidence and may sharply reduce duplicate testing — confirm acceptance with IMANOR or an accredited conformity-assessment body. (2) Radio add-on — if the refrigerator has Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, ANRT radio type-approval is a separate, additional step with no counterpart in the EMC assessment; this must be handled distinctly from the appliance EMC file. Morocco has no EU-style standalone horizontal EMC directive, so there is no EU-equivalent DoC/CE pathway — conformity flows through IMANOR/import-control instead.
gap.zh: 中国出口商面临两项实务差距：（1）符合性证据——摩洛哥在IMANOR认证/进口符合性评定中评估电磁兼容，而非依据独立的EMC指令；证明须引用NM采纳的CISPR 14文本，CCC电磁兼容报告（GB 4343.1）不被自动认可。由于两者同源于CISPR 14，认可实验室出具的基于CISPR 14的CB/检测报告是最具可移植性的证据，可大幅减少重复检测——请与IMANOR或认可的合格评定机构确认接受程度。（2）无线附加项——若电冰箱含Wi-Fi/蓝牙，ANRT无线型号核准为单独的额外步骤，在电磁兼容评定中无对应内容；须与器具电磁兼容文件分开办理。摩洛哥没有欧盟式的独立横向EMC指令，因此不存在欧盟式的DoC/CE路径——符合性改由IMANOR/进口管制承接。
gap.zht: 中國出口商面臨兩項實務差距：（1）符合性證據——摩洛哥在IMANOR認證/進口符合性評定中評估電磁相容，而非依據獨立的EMC指令；證明須引用NM採納的CISPR 14文本，CCC電磁相容報告（GB 4343.1）不被自動認可。由於兩者同源於CISPR 14，認可實驗室出具的基於CISPR 14的CB/檢測報告是最具可移植性的證據，可大幅減少重複檢測——請與IMANOR或認可的合格評定機構確認接受程度。（2）無線附加項——若電冰箱含Wi-Fi/藍牙，ANRT無線型號核准為單獨的額外步驟，在電磁相容評定中無對應內容；須與器具電磁相容文件分開辦理。摩洛哥沒有歐盟式的獨立橫向EMC指令，因此不存在歐盟式的DoC/CE路徑——符合性改由IMANOR/進口管制承接。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — EMC conformity to the NM-adopted CISPR 14 / EN 55014 series is required and assessed within IMANOR certification / import-conformity; separate ANRT radio type-approval applies only if wireless connectivity is present
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to the Moroccan NM standards adopting the CISPR 14 / EN 55014 series is required for household refrigerators and is assessed within IMANOR certification / import-conformity rather than a standalone EMC directive. Chinese CCC EMC data (GB 4343.1) is not auto-accepted, but because both derive from CISPR 14 a CISPR 14-based report may sharply reduce duplicate testing. Wireless-enabled models additionally need ANRT radio type-approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据摩洛哥采纳CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的NM标准的电磁兼容符合性是家用电冰箱的必备要求，并在IMANOR认证/进口符合性中评定，而非依据独立的EMC指令。中国CCC电磁兼容数据（GB 4343.1）不被自动接受，但由于两者同源于CISPR 14，基于CISPR 14的报告可大幅减少重复检测。含无线功能的型号还须取得ANRT无线型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據摩洛哥採納CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列的NM標準的電磁相容符合性是家用電冰箱的必備要求，並在IMANOR認證/進口符合性中評定，而非依據獨立的EMC指令。中國CCC電磁相容數據（GB 4343.1）不被自動接受，但由於兩者同源於CISPR 14，基於CISPR 14的報告可大幅減少重複檢測。含無線功能的型號還須取得ANRT無線型號核准。
